summary: W924 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while exposing W923's target-codomain CompactSpace leaf as the primitive compactness proposition IsCompact (Set.univ : Set (wppOpCodomainW441 Y)). targetCodomainCompactSpaceOfPrimitiveW924 reconstructs W923's CompactSpace field from that primitive and then projects through the W923 route. Product success remains false because all W924 route leaves are still explicit assumptions and the original four-task completion witness and review packet remain incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W924 exposes the target-codomain CompactSpace field as primitive compactness of the universe, but that primitive field and the rest of the W924 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

W924 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W924 fields include raw WPP-limit boundary propositions, primitive relation-pullback and target-relation-lift propositions, the primitive target-difference preimage quantifier inherited from W923, primitive target-codomain compactness of the universe, primitive selected-difference pi1/pi2/pi3 closed-set image propositions, the primitive mapped explicit cokernel closed-set image proposition, strict preimage object and map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, raw fixed-target uniqueness quantifier fields, raw source-category pretriangulated and triangulated propositions, the raw source-side triangle-completion proposition, endpoint closed-embedding/open-map/ExactAt-to-epi facts, and bounded-homotopy localized right-adjoint fields.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the thirty-nine W924 closed-map target-compact-primitive-field explicit inputs.

Choose the next smallest contract-closing increment from source-image normalization, strict-preimage coherence consolidation, branch selection, endpoint facts, localized-right-adjoint data, source-category triangulation evidence, relation primitive proofs, target-surjectivity proof, target-compactness proof, mapped-cokernel primitive proof, selected-difference primitive proofs, or another supported concrete provider boundary.
Connect a real no-argument route to the original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real rather than merely exposed as fields.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
